rationale: Build on the current best projection-specific clipping, but stop perturbing the whole model equally during late quant-aware snaps. This version makes periodic roundtrips target projection matrices by default and applies only a small 0.15 mix to other tensors, on the hypothesis that projection weights dominate the exact int8 roundtrip error while broader late noise was wasting limited 600s training budget. Final exact evaluation and serialization stay unchanged, and the script was trimmed back under the 1500-line cap.
title: Projection-Weighted Quant-Aware Roundtrip
